decks.notes: The main concept of this deck revolves around using a combination of spell counter cards, mana acceleration, and powerful spells to create a win condition without relying on traditional lands. By utilizing cards like Goblin Charbelcher, Lotus Bloom, and Waterlogged Teachings, the deck aims to quickly overpower opponents and disrupt their game plan. The deck also includes cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Whir of Invention to provide versatility and additional options for control and consistency. This Landless Combo deck seeks to outmaneuver opponents with its unique approach to winning the game.

The main concept of this Golgari Aggro deck is to quickly apply pressure on the opponent by playing aggressive creatures like Boggart Trawler and Orcish Bowmasters, while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Dauthi Voidwalker and Thoughtseize. The deck also utilizes graveyard synergies with Necrodominance and Soul Spike to gain value and finish off the opponent. It aims to control the board by using removal spells like Fatal Push and Force of Despair, while also gaining card advantage with cards like Gonti's Machinations and Sorin of House Markov.

The deck focuses on a fast and aggressive playstyle by utilizing creatures and spells that can deal damage quickly to the opponent. It includes a mix of powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt to finish off opponents. The inclusion of cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Goblin Bombardment adds additional versatility and options for dealing with threats. Overall, the deck aims to put pressure on opponents early in the game and maintain that pressure to secure a victory.

The main focus of this deck is to accelerate your mana using cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple to ramp into powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Sire of Seven Deaths. The deck also utilizes control elements such as Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Malevolent Rumble to disrupt your opponent's game plan. By combining ramp, control, and powerful threats, this deck aims to overwhelm and outvalue your opponent in the late game, utilizing Eldrazi synergies to dominate the battlefield.

The deck focuses on aggressive play by utilizing cards with a variety of colors and abilities to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By combining powerful creatures like Scion of Draco and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer with efficient removal like Lightning Bolt and Stubborn Denial, the deck aims to maintain control of the board while steadily dealing damage to the opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of Leyline Binding and Leyline of the Guildpact helps to strengthen the deck's synergy and provide additional support for its aggressive strategy.

The deck focuses on a combination of aggressive creatures and creatures with enter-the-battlefield effects that can be repeatedly activated through blinking. By using cards like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp to repeatedly bounce creatures in and out of play, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful abilities and disruptive plays. Additionally, the deck includes removal spells like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The synergy between aggressive creatures and blink effects allows the deck to apply pressure while maintaining flexibility and disrupting the opponent's strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence through artifacts while disrupting the opponent with counterspells and removal. It utilizes powerful artifact synergies such as sacrificing artifacts with abilities like Arcbound Ravager and Claws of Gix. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mishra's Bauble provide card advantage and recursion. Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke offer versatile removal and disruption options. Mox Opal and Urza's Saga ramp up mana production and search for key artifacts. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with efficient artifact creatures and disruptive spells.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures such as Cori-Steel Cutter and Monastery Swiftspear, while backing them up with efficient removal and burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart. The deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent and close out the game quickly by dealing consistent damage and utilizing strong instant speed spells like Slickshot Show-Off and Violent Urge to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also features card draw and selection tools like Expressive Iteration and Preordain to ensure consistent draws and a smooth curve.

The deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a quick and aggressive strategy, utilizing a combination of powerful creatures and spells to deal large amounts of damage in a short amount of time. By utilizing cards that boost creature power and provide additional damage output, the deck aims to establish board presence early and maintain pressure on the opponent throughout the game. The deck also includes cards that offer protection and support for its aggressive strategy, ensuring that it can maintain its tempo and secure victories efficiently.

This deck focuses on utilizing land destruction and removal spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan while controlling the board. It also includes cards that synergize with each other to provide additional value and answers to various threats. The main strategy is to slow down the opponent's development by destroying their lands and creatures, while advancing your own game plan and eventually overwhelming them with powerful threats like Solitude and Wrath of the Skies.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with creatures, then use reanimation spells such as Persist and Archon of Cruelty to bring them back onto the battlefield for a powerful combo finish. The deck includes ways to discard creatures to the graveyard, as well as ways to search for key pieces like Archon of Cruelty and Persist. By carefully managing the graveyard and using reanimation spells strategically, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board state and close out the game quickly.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Cascade mechanic to cast Living End and bring back powerful creatures from the graveyard to overwhelm the opponent. It includes a mix of creatures with cycling abilities to help dig through the deck and set up the combo. The deck aims to control the board with disruptive spells like Force of Negation and Sink into Stupor until it can successfully cascade into Living End and swing the game in its favor with a board full of creatures.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts to gain tempo advantage and overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive plays. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to ramp up mana, along with cards like Arcbound Ravager and Pinnacle Emissary to pressure the opponent, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt provides disruption against opposing strategies, while cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch provide card advantage and recursion options.

The deck focuses on quickly generating and utilizing artifacts to overwhelm the opponent with high-speed aggression. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to ramp up resources, as well as powerful artifact creatures like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence and apply pressure early in the game. Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke provide additional control options, while Urza's Saga helps to consistently tutor for key artifact pieces. Ultimately, the goal is to outpace the opponent and secure a swift victory through a combination of explosive plays and resource management.

The deck focuses on assembling the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Mine, Urza's Tower, Urza's Power Plant) to generate a large amount of mana quickly. It uses control elements like Chalice of the Void and Karn, the Great Creator to disrupt the opponent's plans while setting up a win condition with big threats like Emrakul, the World Anew and Sire of Seven Deaths. The deck also utilizes artifacts like Mox Opal and The Underworld Cookbook for additional value and card advantage, creating a versatile and powerful strategy to dominate the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing a variety of creatures with different abilities to create various combo interactions. By using cards like Chord of Calling and Birthing Ritual to tutor for specific creatures and generate mana, the deck can quickly assemble its key pieces for powerful plays. Cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician and Marionette Apprentice allow for synergistic combos to drain opponent's life points or generate value. The toolbox nature of the deck allows for flexibility in adapting to different matchups and strategies, making it a versatile and potentially unpredictable deck to face.
